title: tofieldia coccinea subsp. coccinea
intro: Tofieldia coccinea subsp. coccinea, also known as red bog-cotton or red bog-grass, is a perennial plant species within the Tofieldiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tofieldia coccinea subsp. coccinea include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and aiding in the management of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant have been made into infusions, decoctions, and salves, with the roots and leaves used for medicinal purposes.
